narrative:
York Township has 1,624 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
